status_notes.todo: Ready — Rafa will pick this up (maps to Linear 'Todo')
status_notes.in_progress: Rafa is currently working on this (maps to Linear 'In Progress')
status_notes.done: Completed (maps to Linear 'In Review' for QA)
status_notes.pending: Blocked or waiting — Rafa will skip this
status_notes.failed: Could not be completed — Rafa will skip this

owner_notes.human: Requires a human — Rafa will skip this
owner_notes.both: Either can do it — Rafa can pick it up

_schema.tdd_note: Optional boolean per task. true = red-green-refactor regardless of global tdd.enabled. false = opt out even if globally enabled. Omit to inherit from rafa-config.json.

tasks.title: Set up project structure
tasks.description: Create the initial project layout. Add a src/ directory with an index file, a tests/ directory, and a .gitignore covering common build artifacts and environment files. Verify the project runs without errors.

tasks.title: Implement core feature
tasks.description: Implement the main feature. Write the logic in src/, covering the primary use case described in the project brief. Include unit tests.

tasks.title: Review and approve implementation
tasks.description: Human review of the core feature before shipping. Check correctness, edge cases, and code quality.
